error_signature: The provided authorization grant is invalid, expired, revoked
title: Google OAuth2 credentials expire every 5 days
symptom: The Google OAuth2 API credentials stop working every 5 days, requiring re-authentication. The error message indicates that the authorization grant is invalid or expired.
not_this_if: Workflow is already in production status
root_cause: Google's OAuth2 API has different behavior based on the application status. When in testing mode, the credentials may have limitations that cause them to expire or become invalid after a certain period, leading to the need for re-authentication.
fix_steps: Go to the Google Cloud Console
Change the application status from 'Testing' to 'Production'
Save the changes and re-authenticate the OAuth2 credentials
agent_instruction: Change the Google OAuth2 application status to 'Production' in the Google Cloud Console.
